name: Bambu TPU 95A HF @P1S 0.4 (gripper fingers)
filament_start_gcode: ; Bambu TPU 95A HF — apply glue stick to the plate. Dry 70C 8h before printing. HF is AMS-compatible, but a dry external spool is safest for a critical flexing part.
filament_notes: Gripper Fin Ray fingers. Bambu TPU 95A HF (high-flow): ~3x the throughput of standard TPU (max volumetric speed 12 mm3/s, prints up to ~200 mm/s). Bed 30-35C WITH GLUE (Bambu's recommended prep for this filament). Nozzle 220-240C (230C tested). Dry 70C 8h (oven) or X1-bed 80-90C 12h; storage <20% RH. HF runs through the AMS, but for the critical cyclically-flexed finger an external spool with a desiccant box removes any AMS PTFE-bend stringing risk. Use a hardened / abrasion-tolerant 0.4mm nozzle. Pair with the 'Gripper finger TPU 0.16mm @P1S 0.4' process profile. To re-base on Bambu's own preset: import then change 'inherits' to the system 'Bambu TPU 95A HF' if present in your Bambu Studio.
